string.text: Incoming Transmission
Select Response
Communications Centre
Task received. Check your PDA for details.
Unable to process task request at this time.
Location reference added: $location.
$name mentioned this place ($location).
Received $amount RU via electronic transfer.
$amount RU deducted from account.
Your reputation in the Zone has improved.
Your reputation in the Zone has suffered.
$faction relations improved by $amount points.
$faction relations decreased by $amount points.
Received: $what
Stash coordinates received. Check your map.
Insufficient funds for this transaction.
WARNING: Hostile contacts detected in your area.
ALERT: Hostile forces approaching your position.
Friendly contacts inbound to your area.
Friendly units have arrived in your sector.
Reinforcements have linked up with your position.
WARNING: Anomalous biological signatures detected.
DANGER: Mutant contact confirmed in your vicinity.
A courier is en route to your location.
You need to have your PDA open to make a choice.
$name has relocated to $location.
$name has arrived near your position.
$name has joined your squad as a companion.
Cannot recruit - companion limit reached.
$location\n(Marked by $name)
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank:veteran
$player_name. Still kicking? Got some coordinates I don't need anymore. Interested?
Sure, send them over.
Sending now. Don't expect anything fancy. Good luck out there.
reward_stash
What's the catch?
No catch. Heading south, won't need them. Take it or leave it.
reward_stash
Not interested.
Your loss.
none
req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_money:3000
Hey. Word is you've got RU to spare. Transfer 1500 and we pretend this never happened.
Fine. Take it.
Smart. Pleasure doing business.
punish_money:1500
Come and get it yourself.
Wrong answer. Boys are already on their way.
spawn_hostile:bandit:90
[Ignore]
Silent treatment? We'll remember that.
chance:40:spawn_hostile:bandit:90
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank_max:novice,req_time_night
Whatever man. Guess I'm on my own.
Any1 read me? I'm holed up near %cordon_panda_st% and there's something breathing right outside the door. I'm freaking out man, what do I do??
Turn your PDA screen off, don't move, and stay dead silent. It'll pass.
Okay. Okay shutting it down now. Thx.
reward_rep:15,reward_gw:20:stalker
Light it up! Shoot through the walls!
Oh god my gun jammed! IT HEARD ME
punish_rep:25
Welcome to the Zone, greenhorn. Deal with it.
Go to hell!
punish_gw:15:stalker
req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_level:garbage,req_rank_max:trainee
Yo $player_name. Found some decent loot over near %garbage_panda_st%, but my bag is too heavy. Wanna buy the coordinates cheap?
How cheap are we talking?
Just 500 RU. Transfer the cash and I'll send the map marker.
none
Sounds like a trap. Piss off.
Suit yourself, stalker. More for me.
none
Alright, sending 500 RU.
Haha, thanks for the vodka money, sucker! Boys, go say hi.
punish_money:500,spawn_hostile:bandit:80
On second thought, no.
Wasting my time. Watch your back out there.
chance:30:spawn_hostile:bandit:100
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank:experienced,req_rank_max:trainee,req_money_max:1500
Saw you stumbling around earlier, $player_name. Your gear looks like absolute trash. You need a hand before a dog tears your throat out?
Honestly, yeah. I'm completely broke.
We all start somewhere. Sent you coordinates to a stash I outgrew. Don't die before you reach it.
reward_stash,reward_gw:25:stalker
I'm doing fine on my own.
Pride gets you killed in $current_level. Offer stands if you change your mind.
none
req_npc_friendly:csky,req_level:swamp,req_surge_soon:1800
General broadcast to anyone in the $current_level. The sky is getting ugly and our readings are spiking. Seek cover immediately.
Thanks for the heads up. Where is safe around here?
Marking %swamp_panda_st% on your PDA. Solid concrete. Get there now.
watch_location:%swamp_panda_st_key%
My detector says I've still got time.
Your funeral, stalker. Over and out.
none
req_npc_hostile:army,req_level:cordon
Attention unidentified stalker. You are trespassing in a restricted military sector. Pay a 1000 RU transit fine immediately or face lethal force.
Transferring the funds now. Don't shoot.
Fine received. We'll pretend we didn't see you. Move along quickly.
punish_money:1000
Bite me, bootlicker.
Patrol, weapons free. We have a runner.
spawn_hostile:army:90
I don't have that kind of money!
Then you pay in lead. Dispatching patrol unit.
spawn_hostile:army:90
req_level:darkscape,req_npc_faction:monolith,req_time_night
We see you, $player_name. The forest breathes your name. Come to us.
Who the hell is this?!
Your end.
spawn_mutant:random:50
[Turn off radio frequency]
You cannot hide from the light.
chance:50:spawn_mutant:random:60
req_npc_friendly:ecolog,req_level:garbage
Greetings, stalker. We're tracking an anomalous mutant pack migrating near %garbage_panda_st%. We pay well for their tissue samples if someone thins them out.
I need the target practice. I'll clear them out.
Excellent. I've highlighted the sector on your PDA. Good hunting.
watch_location_trigger:%garbage_panda_st_key%:spawn_mutant:random:40:80
Not properly equipped for mutant hunting right now.
A shame. Let us know if your situation changes.
none
req_npc_hostile:killer,req_money:5000
Time's up. You're a dead man.
Target confirmed. We have eyes on you, $player_name. Client put a heavy bounty on your head. You want to live? Pay me double to walk away.
How much to buy my own life?
5000 RU. Transfer it right now, or my spotter takes the shot.
none
Take your best shot, merc.
Just business. Engaging target.
spawn_hostile:killer:70
Alright, fine. Sending the 5000.
Payment received. We're packing up. Watch your back out there, someone still wants you dead.
punish_money:5000
I'm not paying you a dime.
Stupid choice. Weapons free.
spawn_hostile:killer:60
req_npc_friendly:dolg,req_rep:500
Duty broadcast to trusted free stalkers. We failed to contain a large mutant pack pushing through %current_level%. They are highly aggressive.
Send me their last known position. I'll thin the herd.
Appreciated, stalker. We've marked the sector on your PDA. Duty will remember this.
reward_gw:25:dolg,watch_location_trigger:%cordon_panda_st_key%:spawn_mutant:random:50:80
Noted. I'll steer clear.
Stay safe out there.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank:experienced,req_companions_max:0
Hey $player_name, you flying solo right now? I'm heading out to scavenge but my usual partner caught a bullet yesterday. Could use someone to watch my back.
I could use the backup. Link up with me.
Solid. Check your tracker, I'm heading to your coordinates now.
recruit_companion,teleport_npc_to_player:10
I work better alone. Sorry.
Your funeral. Good hunting.
none
req_npc_friendly:freedom,req_time_night
Yoooo $player_name. Zone's looking beautiful tonight, man. You ever just stop and stare at the anomalies? The colors are insane.
You high again?
Maybe a little. Hey, I forgot where I put my backup stash, but I got the coords. You want 'em? I'm too tired to walk.
reward_stash,reward_gw:15:freedom
Keep the channel clear, I'm trying to survive here.
Chill out, man. Bad vibes attract bloodsuckers.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_money:3500,req_npc_rank:veteran
Got a mint condition AK-74 off a dead merc, but I'm over encumbered. I'll let it go for 3000 RU. I can send a runner to drop it off if you've got the cash.
Deal. Sending the 3000 RU now.
Cash confirmed. A courier is en route to your location. Keep your eyes open.
punish_money:3000,courier_item:wpn_ak74
Too steep for me right now.
No sweat. I'll just pawn it off at the Bar.
none
req_npc_hostile:army,req_time_day,req_level:agroprom
(Intercepted Military Comms) "Sweep teams, be advised. Unauthorized stalker detected in your sector. Rules of engagement are shoot on sight."
[Brace for contact]
"Target confirmed. Squad moving to engage."
spawn_hostile:army:70
[Attempt to jam military frequency]
"Command, we're getting heavy interference. We lost the tracker. Switching to manual search pattern."
chance:35:spawn_hostile:army:90
req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_level:garbage
Emergency broadcast! Is anyone near %garbage_panda_st%? My buddy caught a stray bullet and we're out of bandages. Please, we can pay for meds!
I'm close. Hold on, I'm heading to that spot.
Heh... yeah, hurry up hero. We're waiting.
watch_location_trigger:%garbage_panda_st_key%:spawn_hostile:bandit:50:80
Sounds like a trap. Bleed out.
Paranoid bastard. We'll catch you eventually.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_time_night,req_money:8000
hhhey $player_name... u awake? 'm at the bar n ran out of cash. be a good bro n send 500 RU so I can get another round?
You're drunk. Go to sleep before you wander into an anomaly.
ugh... u sound like my ex wife... fine.
none
Here's 500. Have one for me.
ur the best... true bro... 'll pay u back someday.
punish_money:500,reward_gw:20:stalker,reward_rep:10
req_npc_hostile:killer,req_psi_storm_soon:900
(Intercepted Merc Channel) "All actuals, psi-storm incoming. Secure your sectors. If any locals try to use our shelters, put them down."
[Listen silently]
"Wait, unknown connection on this frequency. Someone's listening. Purging channel now."
none
[Broadcast over frequency] Go to hell, mercs.
"Local stalker on the comms. Triangulating signal... Got him. Hit squad dispatched."
spawn_hostile:killer:100
req_npc_friendly:ecolog,req_health_min:0.8
$player_name, this is $npc_name from the mobile lab. We require fresh mutant samples from a high-activity area near %current_level_panda_st%. Can you assist?
I can handle it. Send the location.
Coordinates locked. Transferring an advance payment of 1000 RU for your ammunition expenses. Do be careful.
reward_money:1000,watch_location_trigger:%current_level_panda_st_key%:spawn_mutant:random:50:80,reward_gw:15:ecolog
Sorry doc, I'm busy surviving right now.
Understood. The pursuit of science must wait, it seems.
none
req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_level:cordon
Listen up, $player_name. You're walking on our turf. Pay the toll of 2000 RU, or we fill you with buckshot the second you cross the bridge.
Fine. I don't want any trouble today.
Good boy. Keep your head down and we won't have a problem.
punish_money:2000
I don't have 2000 RU.
Then we'll just take whatever you have off your corpse.
spawn_hostile:bandit:85
Come earn it, scum.
You're gonna regret that.
spawn_hostile:bandit:85
req_npc_friendly:dolg,req_level:rostok
Free stalker on this frequency, this is a Duty patrol. We are pinned down by a massive mutant pack near %rostok_panda_st%. We need covering fire, now!
Hold the line! I'm moving to your coordinates.
Uploading marker to your PDA. Hurry, they're breaking through our perimeter!
watch_location_trigger:%rostok_panda_st_key%:spawn_mutant:random:40:80,reward_gw:30:dolg
Not my problem. Duty can handle itself.
Dammit! We'll remember this, you coward!
punish_gw:20:dolg,punish_rep:15
req_npc_hostile:killer,req_level:wildterritory
Too slow. Firing.
I see you creeping around out there, $player_name. You're right in my crosshairs. Give me one good reason not to squeeze the trigger.
How about 3000 RU to look the other way?
A pragmatic stalker. Transfer the cash and I'll find another target.
punish_money:3000
If you had a clean shot, you would have taken it.
Test me.
spawn_hostile:killer:120
req_npc_faction:monolith,req_weather_fx_active
Embrace the glow, children of the Zone. The Holy Monolith washes away the impure. Step outside your shelters and be cleansed in His light.
You fanatics are completely insane.
The blind cannot see the truth until it burns their eyes. We will show you.
chance:60:spawn_hostile:monolith:70
[Disconnect radio frequency]
He sees you in the dark, $player_name.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank:experienced,req_health_max:0.3
Your vitals on the local network are flatlining, $player_name. You're bleeding out. Need a gun at your back before the dogs smell you?
Yes. Please. I can't patch this up alone.
Hold tight, I'm closing in on your signal. Don't die before I get there.
spawn_companion:stalker:40
I'll manage. Just need to find a quiet corner.
Stubborn to the end. I'll send a runner with some bandages at least. Keep breathing.
courier_item:bandage
req_npc_friendly:csky,req_level:swamp,req_money:1000
Hunter, we've pinged a rare biological signature near %swamp_panda_st%. Could be a lucrative trophy. Interested in the tracking data? It'll cost you 1000 RU to cover our sensor maintenance.
Sounds profitable. I'll take the data.
Sensible investment. Awaiting transfer.
none
I'm not paying for a chance to get mauled.
Fair enough. We'll pass the tip to someone else.
none
Transferring 1000 RU now.
Funds received. Data packet sent to your PDA. Bring enough ammo, signature is large.
punish_money:1000,watch_location_trigger:%swamp_panda_st_key%:spawn_mutant:random:40:80,reward_gw:10:csky
Actually, I changed my mind.
Copy that. Canceling request.
none
req_npc_hostile:renegade
Open broadcast: Found a dead military courier out here with a locked secure case. I can't crack the electronic lock. Anyone want to buy the coordinates for 500 RU?
I've got the tools for that. Sending the 500 RU.
Got the cash. The only thing you're cracking open today is your own skull, idiot. Boys, flank him!
punish_money:500,spawn_hostile:renegade:50
Obviously a trap. Find some other sucker.
Smartass. Keep looking over your shoulder.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_rep:1000
Word travels fast, $player_name. People are saying you're one of the few out here actually worth a damn. Attached some coordinates for a stash. Consider it a thank you from the local boys.
I appreciate that. Stay safe out there, brother.
You too. Zone protects.
reward_stash,reward_gw:15:stalker
req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_kills:150,req_rank:veteran
Alright, alright! We saw what you did to the last crew that messed with you. Just... don't come after us, okay? I'll wire you 2000 RU right now to just walk the other way!
Smart choice. Send it and I'll ignore you. This time.
Sending it! We're packing up and leaving the sector right now. Just don't shoot!
reward_money:2000,punish_rep:10
Keep your dirty money. I'm coming for you next.
You crazy bastard! Defensive positions, he's coming!
spawn_hostile:bandit:80,reward_rep:15
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_companions_max:0
Hey, $player_name. I'm bogged down trying to haul some salvage and could use a second gun. You want to group up and split the profits? I can head to your signal.
Sure, move to my coordinates. Let's make some money.
On my way. Keep the local mutants busy for a minute.
recruit_companion,teleport_npc_to_player:15
I work alone. Good luck with the haul.
Understood. Catch you back at camp.
none
req_npc_friendly:ecolog,req_rank:professional,req_companions_max:1
Stalker $player_name, my field guard was killed by an anomaly and my suit is damaged. I need an experienced escort immediately. I can authorize an advance transfer of 2500 RU.
Transfer the funds. I'll secure your position and get you moving.
Payment transferred! I am moving to your GPS coordinates now. Please cover my approach!
reward_money:2500,recruit_companion,teleport_npc_to_player:10
Too dangerous right now, Professor. Hide and pray.
Unacceptable! If I die out here, my research dies with me!
punish_gw:15:ecolog
req_npc_hostile:isg,req_time_night
(Encrypted Channel Intercept) "Vanguard actual, sweeping $current_level now. Local stalker population is highly active. Requesting authorization to sanitize the sector."
[Break encryption] Try it, you western ghosts.
"Signal intrusion detected. Trace complete. Target localized. Executing sweep."
spawn_hostile:isg:80
[Listen silently and prepare]
"Authorization granted. Vanguard, weapons free on all non-operatives."
chance:40:spawn_hostile:isg:120
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_level:garbage,req_rank_max:trainee,req_money:800
Hey, anyone near %garbage_panda_st%? I watched some Duty guy bury a rucksack there, but he spotted me so I had to run. I'll sell the exact spot for 800 RU.
I'm nearby. Here's your 800 RU.
Got it. Sent the coordinates to your PDA. Hope he left something good.
punish_money:800,reward_stash
I'm not paying for stolen Duty gear.
More morals than money, huh? Suit yourself.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank_max:trainee,req_time_night
Is any1 on this freq?? I'm pinned down. Something is out there in the dark and I'm out of buckshot...
Keep your voice down. Where are you?
I'm hiding near %cordon_panda_st%. Please hurry, I can hear them breathing!
none
Not my problem. Keep quiet and wait for dawn.
Bastard! If I die, my blood is on your— OH GOD!
punish_rep:25
I'm marking the location. Hold tight.
Thank you!! I'm not moving.
watch_location_trigger:%cordon_panda_st_key%:spawn_mutant:random:50:80
Actually, I'm too far away. You're on your own.
No, wait! Pl-
punish_rep:10
req_npc_hostile:killer,req_money:15000,req_rank:experienced
We've been tracking your PDA signature, $player_name. You have a bounty on your head. 10,000 RU wired to me right now, and my squad looks the other way.
Fine. The transfer is sent. Call off your dogs.
Confirmed. We never saw you. Have a nice day.
punish_money:10000
I'm not paying you a dime, merc scum.
Wrong choice. Weapons free, boys.
spawn_hostile:killer:100
Let's negotiate. How about I just kill you instead?
Big words. Let's see if you can back them up.
chance:50:spawn_hostile:killer:75
req_npc_friendly:ecolog,req_surge_soon:1800,req_rep:500
Stalker $player_name, our telemetry indicates a massive emission building up. You have less than 30 minutes. Seek hard cover immediately.
Appreciate the warning, Doc. I'll find shelter.
Stay safe. By the way, my colleagues left some excess supplies behind during their last survey. I'll forward you the coordinates.
reward_stash
I know. I can feel my teeth vibrating.
That... is not a good sign. Take anti-radiation medication and get underground!
none
req_npc_friendly:dolg,req_npc_rank:veteran
Attention free stalkers. Duty is organizing a mutant sweep in the vicinity of %garbage_panda_st%. We need extra rifles. Compensation provided.
I'm in. Send me the exact rally point.
Transmitting coordinates for %garbage_panda_st%. Engage any hostile fauna on sight. Don't shoot my men.
watch_location_trigger:%garbage_panda_st_key%:spawn_mutant:random:60:120
Busy right now. Good luck.
Understood. Stay clear of the sector, we'll be firing indiscriminately.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_time_night,req_money_max:1000
Maaaan... I'm so wasted. Dropped my reserve stash somewhere today. Don't even care. Vodka is all I need right now.
You dropped a stash? Where?
I dunno... *hic*... somewhere over here. Wait, I marked it on my PDA earlier. Here, you take it. I love you man.
reward_stash
Go to sleep, stalker. You're broadcasting on an open channel.
You're not my mom! *hic* ...zzzzzz...
none
req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_health_max:0.4
Hey stalker, saw you take a bad hit through my scope. You're bleeding out. I can drop a medkit for 500 RU. No tricks.
I'm desperate. I'll transfer the cash. Come drop it.
Heh. Thanks for the cash, sucker. Now let's take the rest of your gear!
punish_money:500,spawn_hostile:bandit:50
Your PDA tags you as a Bandit. Nice try, scum.
Shame. Guess we'll just wait for you to bleed to death.
chance:30:spawn_hostile:bandit:80
[Ignore]
Ignoring me? Fine. Boys, flush him out.
spawn_hostile:bandit:60
req_npc_friendly:csky,req_money:5000,req_weather_fx_not_active
$player_name, my scanners picked up some interesting anomalies nearby. Might be artifacts, might just be old salvage. I'm too busy to check it out. Want the data?
Sure. What's it going to cost me?
2000 RU for my time and effort.
none
Not buying blindly. Forget it.
Suit yourself. Someone else will take it.
none
Transferring the 2000 RU now.
Received. Uploading the coordinates to your PDA. Happy hunting.
punish_money:2000,reward_stash
Too steep for me. Never mind.
Information isn't free in the Zone, friend.
none
req_npc_faction:monolith,req_psi_storm_soon:600
The sky tears open. The Great Eye sees you, infidel. Your mind will shatter in the coming light.
Shut up, fanatic.
We come for you. The Monolith demands it.
spawn_hostile:monolith:120
[Turn off PDA receiver]
You cannot hide from His gaze...
none
The silence of the infidel is their acceptance of death.
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_companions_max:0,req_rep:500,req_rank:experienced
Hey $player_name, I've heard good things about you around the campfires. You running solo right now? I'm looking to team up with someone reliable.
I could use the backup. Where are you?
Not too far. Give me a minute to pack my gear, I'll meet up with you shortly.
teleport_npc_to_player:5,recruit_companion
I work better alone. Sorry.
Fair enough. Good hunting out there.
none
req_level:k01_darkscape,req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_money:5000
Look who just wandered into my territory. I see your PDA signal, $player_name. Pay the toll or my boys will make you a permanent fixture here.
I don't have time for this. Take 2000 RU and call off your mutts.
A smart stalker. Enjoy your walk. I've told the boys to stand down.
punish_money:2000,reward_gw:25:bandit
Come get it yourself, trash.
Wrong answer. Light 'em up, boys!
spawn_hostile:bandit:80
Ignoring me? Big mistake. Hope you brought body armor.
req_psi_storm_soon:400,req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank_max:trainee
Oh man, the PDA says a psi-storm is hitting! The guards at the shelter won't let me in without 3000 RU! Please, someone help me out!
I'm wiring you the cash. Get inside, kid!
Received! You saved my life, $player_name! I owe you big time!
punish_money:3000,reward_rep:75,reward_gw:25:stalker
Not my problem. Find a pipe to crawl into.
You heartless bastard! If I survive this, I'm... *static*
punish_rep:25
req_time_night,req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank:veteran
Hey... $player_name. You evr thik about how many of us are just... fertilizer waiting to happen? *hic* Whole Zone is a graveyard.
You're drunk, $npc_name. Turn off your PDA and go to sleep.
Don't tell me what to do. M' fine. Just... resting my eyes.
none
I try not to think about it. Keep your head down, brother.
Yeah yeah... safe. Always safe. Here, take this stash I found bfore I drank the proceeds. Cheers.
chance:75:reward_stash
Stop cluttering the network, drunkard.
Screw you too, big shot. Hope a bloodsucker finds you.
punish_rep:5,punish_gw:5:stalker
req_npc_friendly:killer,req_mutant_kills:50
Word on the network is you've been leaving a trail of dead mutants across $current_level. My clients pay top ruble for rare parts. Keep hunting.
Send a runner. I've got plenty to unload.
Good doing business. I'm sending a courier with some supplies as a down payment. Keep thinning the herd.
courier_item:medkit_scientic,reward_money:2500
I hunt to survive, not to feed your black market.
Your loss. Offer stands if you get hungry for cash.
none
req_npc_friendly:ecolog,req_actor_near_smart:%jupiter_panda_st_key%:400,req_level:jupiter
Attention $player_name! Our bunker scanners are picking up a massive biological anomaly heading toward %jupiter_panda_st%. You are directly in their path!
Thanks for the heads up, professor. I'm taking cover.
Stay safe. We cannot afford to lose reliable field operators.
reward_rep:10
I can handle a few muties. Let them come.
You are severely underestimating the reading! Godspeed, stalker...
spawn_mutant:random:60
Send me the exact coordinates. I'll avoid it.
Uploading %jupiter_panda_st% coordinates to your PDA now. Divert immediately.
watch_location:%jupiter_panda_st_key%:100
req_rank:expert,req_npc_hostile:army,req_npc_rank_max:trainee
Listen, stalker... I see your PDA signal. I know your reputation. I'm just doing my rotation here, I don't want to die today. Just walk the other way.
Drop some cash via wire and I might forget I saw your signal.
Are you serious? Extorting the military?
none
Your uniform makes you a target, soldier. See you in a minute.
Oh god... Squad! Defensive positions! We have a hostile veteran approaching!
spawn_hostile:army:90
1500 RU, or you're dead. Your choice.
Fine! Transferred! Just leave me alone!
reward_money:1500,punish_rep:10
Actually, I changed my mind. I'm coming for you.
You sick bastard! Contact! Contact!
spawn_hostile:army:60
req_surge_soon:800,req_npc_faction:monolith,req_time_night
The Holy Monolith calls to you, lost one. The sky burns tonight to cleanse your sins. Cast aside your weapons and embrace the glow.
Get off this frequency, you brainwashed freak.
Blasphemer. We will find your charred remains in the ash.
chance:40:spawn_hostile:monolith:120
Praise the Monolith! (Lie)
The deceiver speaks with a forked tongue. The Light sees your true nature.
spawn_hostile:monolith:80
Your silence condemns you. The Light will purify.
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank_max:trainee,req_companions_max:1
$player_name, I'm bleeding out near your position. Ran into a pack of dogs and my medkit is dry. If you help me out, my gun is yours for the day.
I'll ping my location. Get here fast and I'll patch you up.
Moving. Thank you. Just don't shoot when you see me...
teleport_npc_to_player,recruit_companion
Too risky. You're on your own, stalker.
Damn you to hell... I hope they eat you too.
punish_rep:20,punish_gw:10:stalker
req_kills:100,req_rep:400,req_npc_friendly:dolg
Command noticed your operational efficiency, $player_name. We have a rogue bandit squad moving through the sector. Handle it for us, and there's a cache waiting for you.
Send the coordinates. I'll take out the trash.
Marking their last known location. Check your PDA for the cache coordinates as payment.
spawn_hostile:bandit:100,reward_stash,reward_gw:20:dolg
Busy with my own work. Pass.
Understood. We'll deploy a regular patrol instead.
none
req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_level:garbage
Hey, any stalkers reading this? Found a massive artifact cluster near %garbage_panda_st%, but I can't carry it all alone. 50/50 split if you help me haul it.
I'm close. Send the exact spot.
Marking my PDA beacon on your map right now. Hurry before someone else sees this!
watch_location_trigger:%garbage_panda_st_key%:spawn_hostile:bandit:40:60
Sounds like a setup. Buzz off.
Suit yourself, paranoid freak. More loot for me.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank:veteran,req_money:15000
Got my hands on a pristine SEVA suit off a dead merc, but it's too bulky to haul around. I'll let it go for 12,000 RU. I can have a runner bring it to your coordinates if you've got the cash.
Deal. Sending the 12,000 RU now. Tell your runner to hurry.
Payment confirmed. My guy is en route to you now. Keep your weapon lowered when he approaches.
punish_money:12000,courier_item:scientific_outfit
Too rich for my blood right now.
No sweat. I'll pass it off to the Ecologists then.
none
req_npc_friendly:freedom,req_level:truck_cemetery,req_time_night
Yo $player_name! We're planning a midnight raid on a Bandit scrap camp near %truck_cemetery_panda_st%. You want in on the fun? There's plenty of loot to go around.
Hell yeah. Send the rally point, I'll meet you there.
Right on, man! I've marked the spot. Let's show those thugs how it's done!
watch_location_trigger:%truck_cemetery_panda_st_key%:spawn_hostile:bandit:50:80,reward_gw:25:freedom
I'm trying to sleep. Go bother someone else.
Total buzzkill. Catch you later.
none
req_npc_hostile:bandit,req_npc_rank_max:novice,req_rank:veteran
Hey tough guy! Empty your digital wallet right now! Transfer 1000 RU or me and the boys are gonna track your signal and carve you up!
Do you even know who you're talking to, kid? Come find me.
Oh, you think you're funny? We're coming! ...Wait, guys, he's actually moving toward us! Oh crap!
spawn_hostile:bandit:50,reward_rep:15
Haha, sure kid. Here's your lunch money.
Wait, really? I... I mean, yeah! Pleasure doing business, chump!
punish_money:1000,punish_rep:10
[Ignore the punk]
Hello?? I'm not playing around! ...Whatever, you aren't worth my time.
chance:20:spawn_hostile:bandit:80
req_npc_friendly:ecolog,req_level:yantar,req_rep:300
Stalker, we have an emergency. One of our telemetry drones crashed near %yantar_panda_st%. We need the data drive recovered before the local fauna destroys it.
I'm close by. Wire me an advance and I'll clear the area.
Transferring 2000 RU for ammunition. I am marking the crash site on your PDA now. Be extremely careful, the noise has likely attracted mutants.
reward_money:2000,watch_location_trigger:%yantar_panda_st_key%:spawn_mutant:snork:40:80,reward_gw:25:ecolog
Not risking my neck in Yantar right now. Good luck.
A pity. We will have to dispatch a mercenary squad instead.
none
req_npc_hostile:killer,req_health_max:0.5
Look at you, $player_name. Bleeding all over my thermal scope. Drop 5000 RU right now to cover my contract fee, or I finish the job the mutants started.
Fine! Take the money, just don't shoot!
Smart move. Go find a bandage before you bleed to death anyway.
punish_money:5000
You'll have to come down here and take it off my corpse!
Gladly. Engaging target.
spawn_hostile:killer:90
Time's up. Taking the shot.
req_npc_friendly:csky,req_companions_max:0
Priority request to any free stalker! My squad got wiped out by an anomaly field. I'm injured and lost my primary weapon. I need an escort back to safety immediately!
Keep your head down. I'm pinging your PDA and moving to assist.
Thank God... I'm heading toward your signal now. Please cover my approach!
teleport_npc_to_player:10,recruit_companion,reward_gw:30:csky,reward_rep:20
I'm not running a charity. You're on your own.
You son of a bitch. If I make it out of here, I swear I'll... *static*
punish_rep:15,punish_gw:15:csky
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_time_night,req_level:radar
Do you hear that? The whispering... they're right outside. They know I have the stash coordinates. They're trying to dig through the concrete!
Calm down. Send me the coordinates and they'll lose interest in you.
Yes! Yes, take them! Now they'll go after you! I'm safe... I'm safe...
reward_stash,reward_rep:5
You're losing your mind to the emissions. Turn off your radio and hide.
No... no, the radio is the only thing keeping them out! *manic laughter*
none
req_npc_hostile:renegade,req_level:swamp,req_money:1000
Heard you're looking for artifacts, stalker. I found a pristine Meat Chunk near %swamp_panda_st%, but I don't have a lead box for it. 1000 RU and the exact coords are yours.
Seems cheap for an artifact. Here's your cash.
Thanks for the vodka money, idiot. Try not to drown in the muck when my boys fill you full of holes.
punish_money:1000,watch_location_trigger:%swamp_panda_st_key%:spawn_hostile:renegade:40:80
A Renegade playing merchant? Do I look stupid?
Yeah, actually, you do. Watch your back in the reeds.
none
req_npc_faction:monolith,req_level:pripyat
The streets of the Holy City belong to the Monolith. Turn back, trespasser, or become one with the concrete. We are everywhere.
Try and stop me, brainwashed freak.
Your blood will wash the streets clean.
spawn_hostile:monolith:90
[Disconnect from local frequency]
You can mute the radio... but you cannot mute the voice in your head.
chance:50:spawn_hostile:monolith:120
req_npc_hostile:army,req_level:agroprom,req_money:4000
Attention unidentified stalker. You are moving through a Spetsnaz operational zone. Wire a 3000 RU operational disruption fee immediately, or we call an artillery strike on your PDA signal.
I'm not dealing with artillery today. Here is your bribe.
We appreciate your cooperation with the Armed Forces. Move along quickly.
punish_money:3000
You're bluffing. You don't have artillery support out here.
Maybe. But we do have assault rifles. Sweep team, engage the target!
spawn_hostile:army:80
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_companions_max:0
Hey $player_name. I just hit the motherlode, but I'm carrying so much weight I can barely walk. I need a trigger finger to watch my back while I haul this to the nearest trader.
What's my cut if I play bodyguard?
I'll transfer 3000 RU the second we link up, and toss you some spare ammo. Sound fair?
none
Can't right now, carrying too much myself.
Damn. Guess I'll have to cache half of it. See you around.
none
Very fair. Move to my position, I'll cover you.
Awesome. Transferring funds and heading your way now. Try not to shoot me in the face.
reward_money:3000,teleport_npc_to_player:10,recruit_companion
Make it 5000 or I walk.
Greedy bastard. I'd rather take my chances with the bandits. Forget it.
punish_rep:5
req_npc_friendly:dolg,req_rank:veteran,req_level:garbage
$player_name, this is Duty Command. We've tracked a high-profile Bandit captain setting up an ambush point near %garbage_panda_st%. We authorize a preemptive strike. Exterminate them.
On it. Send me the exact coordinates.
Coordinates locked to your PDA. Show them no mercy. Duty will compensate you with a stash drop once the deed is done.
watch_location_trigger:%garbage_panda_st_key%:spawn_hostile:bandit:40:80,reward_stash,reward_gw:30:dolg
Duty handles Duty's problems. I'm sitting this one out.
Disappointing, but expected from a free stalker. We'll handle it ourselves.
none
req_npc_friendly:stalker,req_npc_rank_max:novice,req_money:500
I haven't eaten in two days... the trader ripped me off, and I'm too weak to hunt. Can anyone spare 300 RU so I can just buy some bread?
Here's 300 RU. Go get yourself a meal, kid.
Thank you! Thank you so much! I won't forget this!
punish_money:300,reward_rep:25,reward_gw:15:stalker
Better learn to hunt, or the Zone will swallow you whole.
I... I guess you're right. Thanks for nothing.
punish_rep:5
req_npc_hostile:isg,req_rank:expert
(Encrypted Intercept) "Control, we have positive ID on local operative $player_name. Target has proven highly disruptive to our operations. Requesting green light for immediate termination."
[Brace for contact and prepare weapons]
"Green light confirmed. Strike team, move in and sanitize the target."
spawn_hostile:isg:90
[Broadcast] You want me? Come and get me, ghosts.
"Target is aware of our presence. All units, go loud. Do not let them escape."
spawn_hostile:isg:70
